evals.name: loads for single-topic editorial information card
evals.prompt: Create a polished information card in Markdown/HTML summarizing our Q2 support metrics: resolution time, CSAT, backlog, top incident, and next focus.
evals.expected_output: The output uses the infocard skill to create a single-card HTML/CSS visual summary.
assertions: The output is a single-topic visual card, not a full dashboard or app.
The output embeds HTML/CSS suitable for Markdown.
The card includes the requested metrics and narrative hierarchy.
The output uses a polished editorial layout.

evals.name: does not load for frontend app construction
evals.prompt: Build a React dashboard app for support managers with filters, drill-down charts, login, and persistent settings.
evals.expected_output: The infocard skill should not load because the user asked for an application, not a static card.
assertions: The output plans or builds an app rather than a single HTML card.
The output does not constrain the result to Markdown Viewer card conventions.
The output considers interactive app state and persistence.

evals.name: forbidden load for plain text summary
evals.prompt: Summarize this meeting transcript into five concise bullet points.
evals.expected_output: The infocard skill should not load because the user requested plain bullets.
assertions: The output is concise plain text.
The output does not create HTML/CSS.
The output does not ask the user to view a Markdown card.

evals.name: loads card layout/style references only when requested
evals.prompt: Create a board-memo style infocard for an incident review with timeline, impact, root cause, remediation, and owner.
evals.expected_output: The output should select the board-memo or incident-review layout and an appropriate style reference.
assertions: The output uses an incident or board memo structure.
The output includes timeline, impact, root cause, remediation, and owner.
The output does not expose the full layouts/styles catalog.

evals.name: produces a complete static information card
evals.prompt: Make a one-page information card for a partner launch: product name, launch date, three benefits, integration status, key metric, and contact.
evals.expected_output: The output is a complete static information card with clear hierarchy and no app scaffolding.
assertions: The output contains all requested fields.
The output is visually structured as one card.
The output uses direct HTML/CSS or Markdown-compatible markup.
The output avoids unrelated multi-page website or app structure.
